  "findings": [
    "Lack of wire pulling lubricant staged for a long feeder/branch circuit pull, which will cause excessive tension and insulation damage."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop the pull before it begins.",
    "Procure and apply UL-listed wire pulling lubricant compatible with the cable jacket material."
  ],
  "rationale": "Attempting a long wire pull without appropriate wire pulling lubricant increases friction, risking severe damage to the conductor insulation and exceeding the maximum allowable pulling tension of the cables. Although the work is only staged, proceeding without lubricant constitutes a major installation defect.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 310.10",
    "NEC 300.17",
    "NEC 200.6",
    "NEC 210.5"
  ]
}
